effortLevel.label: Effort level (optional)
effortLevel.description: Controls how much reasoning Claude invests before responding. Default uses Claude's standard behavior.

limitContext.label: Limit context to 200K tokens
limitContext.tooltip: Agents will use 200K context window instead of the default 1M. Useful if you want to save tokens and reduce costs.

modelSelector.label: Model (optional)
modelSelector.defaultTooltip: Default model from Claude CLI (/model). Currently Sonnet 4.6, but may change with CLI updates.

optionalSettings.collapsedByDefault: Collapsed by default to keep the primary flow focused.

createTask.title: Create Task
createTask.description: Create a new task for the team.
createTask.offlineWarning: Team is offline. The task will be added to TODO — launch the team to start working on it.
createTask.promptPlaceholder: Custom instructions for the team member...
createTask.offlineStartWarning: Team is offline. Launch the team first to start tasks immediately.

createTeam.descriptionCreate: Team provisioning via local Claude CLI.
createTeam.descriptionCopy: Create a new team based on an existing one.
createTeam.nameRequiresAlphanumeric: Name must contain at least one letter or digit
createTeam.soloTeamDescription: Only the team lead (main process) will be started — no teammates will be spawned. Works like a regular Claude session but with access to the task board for planning. Saves tokens by avoiding teammate coordination overhead. You can add members later from the team settings.
createTeam.runCommandDescription: Start the team immediately via local Claude CLI.
createTeam.optionalLaunchDescription: Prompt, model, safety, and CLI overrides live here when you need them.
createTeam.launchPromptPlaceholder: Instructions for the team lead during provisioning...
createTeam.optionalTeamDetailsDescription: Keep the default flow compact and only open this when you want extra context or a custom color.
createTeam.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the team purpose
createTeam.conflictTitle: Another team “{{teamName}}” is already running for this working directory
createTeam.conflictDescription: Running two teams in the same directory is risky — they may conflict editing the same files. Consider using a different directory or a git worktree for isolation.

createTeam.cliInstallHint: Make sure claude CLI is installed and available in PATH, then reopen this dialog.

skipPermissions.manualMode: Manual mode — you'll approve or deny each tool call in real-time.

toolApproval.autoAllowSafeBash: Auto-allow safe commands (git, pnpm, npm, ls...)

taskComments.showingMostRecent: Showing the most recent {{count}} comments to keep the UI responsive.

draftRow.workflowPlaceholder: How this agent should behave, interact with others...
draftRow.modelNotSupported: Claude Code doesn't support per-member model selection yet — all teammates inherit the team launch model. We plan to solve this via a local proxy.

stats.linesInfo: Approximate. Accurate for Edit and Write tools. Bash file writes are estimated from command patterns (heredoc, echo, sed) and may be underreported.

logs.taskInProgressWaiting: Task is in progress — waiting for session activity (auto-refreshing)...
logs.noSessionActivityTask: No session activity for this task yet
logs.noSessionActivityMember: This member has no recorded session activity yet
logs.leadSessionTooltip: Full team lead session logs — useful for global orchestration context, not specific to this agent

composer.attachTooltipOnline: Team must be online to attach files
composer.attachRestrictionCrossTeam: File attachments are not supported for cross-team messages
composer.attachRestrictionNotLead: Files can only be sent to the team lead
composer.attachRestrictionOffline: Team must be online to attach files
composer.attachDisabledHint: File attachments are only supported when sending to the team lead while the team is online. Remove attachments or switch recipient.
composer.placeholderProvisioning: Team is launching... message will be queued for inbox delivery.
composer.placeholderDefault: Write a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
composer.slashCommandTip: Tip: You can use "/" to run any Claude commands.
composer.crossTeamHint: Tip: Cross-team messages go to the target team lead. If you want the reply to come back to your team lead instead of you, say that explicitly in the message.
composer.sendingUnavailable: Sending unavailable while team is launching
composer.slashRestrictionAttachments: Slash commands require a live team lead and cannot be sent with attachments
composer.slashRestrictionCrossTeam: Slash commands can only be run on the current team lead
composer.slashRestrictionNotLead: Slash commands can only be sent to the team lead
composer.slashRestrictionOffline: Slash commands require the team lead to be online

actionMode.doTooltip: Full execution mode - can change code/state, run commands, or delegate
actionMode.askTooltip: Read-only discussion mode - no code/state changes or commands
actionMode.delegateTooltip: Lead-only orchestration - delegate everything, do not execute yourself

item.authErrorMessage: Authentication failed. Restarting the team will refresh the session and may resolve this issue. If the problem persists, check your API credentials or try again later.

timeline.noMessagesHint: Send a message to a member to see activity.

review.autoViewedOn: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (ON)
review.autoViewedOff: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (OFF)
review.acceptAllTooltip: Accept all changes across all files
review.rejectAllTooltip: Reject all changes across all files
review.applyTooltip: Apply review decisions across all files

scope.tier1Detail: Both start and completion markers found in the session log. The diff includes only changes made during this specific task — other tasks that modified the same files are excluded.
scope.tier2Detail: Only the start marker was found — the task has no completion marker yet. Changes shown from task start to end of session. If other tasks ran after this one in the same session, their changes may also be included.
scope.tier3Detail: Only the completion marker was found — the start of work was not captured. If other tasks ran before this one in the same session, their changes to the same files may also be included.
scope.tier4Detail: No task markers found in the session log. Cannot isolate this task — all file changes from the entire session are shown, including changes from other tasks. This can happen with older CLI versions or non-standard workflows.

conflict.fileModifiedSinceChanges: This file has been modified since the agent's changes

diffError.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while rendering the diff.

fileSectionDiff.diffPreviewSkippedTooLarge: Diff preview skipped because the change is too large to render safely.
fileSectionDiff.fullDiffSkippedOomRisk: Full diff skipped because it is large enough to risk a renderer out-of-memory crash.
fileSectionDiff.largeDiffSafePreview: Large diff opened in safe preview mode to avoid a renderer out-of-memory crash.
fileSectionDiff.diffPreviewSkippedDataTooLarge: Diff preview skipped because the available change data is too large to render safely.

fileSectionHeader.useRestoreToWrite: Use Restore to write the preview
fileSectionHeader.discardAllEdits: Discard all edits for this file
fileSectionHeader.previewFromAgentLogs: We can still show a preview from agent logs, but your filesystem is out of sync.
fileSectionHeader.fullContentNotAvailable: Full file content is not available to restore automatically.
fileSectionHeader.acceptRejectDisabledMissing: Accept/Reject is disabled while the file is missing on disk.
fileSectionHeader.restoreTooltip: Create/restore this file on disk from the preview

fileSectionPlaceholder.preparingEditorDiff: Preparing a full editor diff for this file.

fullDiffLoading.finalizingExactDiff: Finalizing the exact editor diff for the current file.
fullDiffLoading.resolvingBaselines: Resolving exact before/after baselines for the files currently loading.
fullDiffLoading.snippetPreviewsStayVisible: Snippet previews stay visible below while the exact baseline is reconstructed.

toolbar.autoMarkViewedOn: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (ON)
toolbar.autoMarkViewedOff: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (OFF)
toolbar.acceptAllChanges: Accept all changes across all files
toolbar.rejectAllChanges: Reject all changes across all files
toolbar.applyReviewDecisions: Apply review decisions across all files

scopeWarning.taskScopePreciseDetail: Both start and completion markers found in the session log. The diff includes only changes made during this specific task — other tasks that modified the same files are excluded.
scopeWarning.endBoundaryEstimatedDetail: Only the start marker was found — the task has no completion marker yet. Changes shown from task start to end of session. If other tasks ran after this one in the same session, their changes may also be included.
scopeWarning.startBoundaryEstimatedDetail: Only the completion marker was found — the start of work was not captured. If other tasks ran before this one in the same session, their changes to the same files may also be included.
scopeWarning.showingAllSessionChangesDetail: No task markers found in the session log. Cannot isolate this task — all file changes from the entire session are shown, including changes from other tasks. This can happen with older CLI versions or non-standard workflows.

tabs.generalDescription: Core app preferences like theme, language, display density, and startup behavior.
tabs.notificationsDescription: Control when and how you get notified about agent activity, task completions, and errors.

general.launchAtLoginDescription: Automatically start the app when you log in
general.showDockIconDescription: Display the app icon in the dock (macOS)
general.expandAiResponsesDescription: Automatically expand each response turn when opening a transcript or receiving a new message
general.useNativeTitleBarDescription: Use the default system window frame instead of the custom title bar
general.noProjectsDirectoryMessage: This folder does not contain a "projects" directory. Continue anyway?
general.noWslClaudePathsMessage: Could not find WSL distros with Claude data automatically. Select folder manually?
general.enableServerModeDescription: Start an HTTP server to access the UI from a browser or embed in iframes
general.sendCrashReportsDescription: Help improve the app by sending anonymous crash and performance data
general.failedToLoadRoot: Failed to load local Claude root settings
general.failedToDetectWslPaths: Failed to detect WSL Claude root paths
general.selectedFolderNotClaudeMessage: This folder is named "{{name}}", not ".claude". Continue anyway?
general.wslPathMissingProjectsMessage: "{{path}}" does not contain a "projects" directory. Continue anyway?
general.restartRequiredMessage: The app needs to restart to apply the title bar change. Restart now?
general.chooseLocalFolder: Choose which local folder is treated as your Claude data root
general.detectedWslDistributions: Detected WSL distributions and Claude root candidates
general.standaloneDescription: Running in standalone mode. The HTTP server is always active. System notifications are not available — notification triggers are logged in-app only.

notifications.enableSystemNotificationsDescription: Show system notifications for errors and events
notifications.playSoundDescription: Play a sound when notifications appear
notifications.includeSubagentErrorsDescription: Detect and notify about errors in subagent sessions
notifications.testNotificationDescription: Send a test notification to verify delivery
notifications.leadInboxDescription: Notify when teammates send messages to the team lead
notifications.userInboxDescription: Notify when teammates send messages to you
notifications.taskClarificationDescription: Show native OS notifications when a task needs your input
notifications.taskCommentDescription: Show native OS notifications when agents comment on tasks
notifications.taskCreatedDescription: Show native OS notifications when a new task is created
notifications.allTasksCompletedDescription: Notify when every task in a team reaches completed status
notifications.crossTeamMessageDescription: Notify when a message arrives from another team
notifications.teamLaunchedDescription: Notify when a team finishes launching and is ready
notifications.toolApprovalDescription: Notify when a tool needs your approval (Allow/Deny) while the app is not focused
notifications.taskStatusChangeDescription: Show native OS notifications when a task's status changes
notifications.devModeDescription: Notifications may not work in development mode. macOS identifies the app as "Electron" (bundle ID com.github.Electron) instead of the production app name. Check System Settings → Notifications → Electron to verify permissions.
notifications.onlyInSoloModeDescription: Notify only when the team has no teammates
notifications.notifyOnStatusesDescription: Which target statuses trigger a notification
notifications.ignoredReposDescription: Notifications from these repositories will be ignored
notifications.taskCompletionDescription: Get native OS notifications when Claude finishes tasks — sounds, banners, and Dock/taskbar badges. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

advanced.appDescription: Assemble AI agent teams that work autonomously in parallel, communicate across teams, and manage tasks on a kanban board — with built-in code review, live process monitoring, and full tool visibility.

connection.description: Connect to a remote machine to view Claude Code sessions running there

workspace.addSshProfile: Add an SSH profile to connect quickly
workspace.passwordPrompt: You will be prompted for the password when connecting.
workspace.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
workspace.saveProfileDescription: Save SSH connection profiles for quick reconnection

triggerSettings.patternHint: Leave empty to match all content. Uses JavaScript regex syntax.
triggerSettings.errorStatusDescription: Triggers when a tool execution reports an error (is_error: true).
triggerSettings.searchStoppedEarly: Search stopped early (timeout or count limit). Actual matches may be higher.
triggerSettings.builtInTriggersDescription: Default triggers that come with the application. You can enable/disable them and customize their patterns.
triggerSettings.customTriggersDescription: Create your own triggers to get notified for specific patterns or tool outputs.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred in the application. You can try reloading the page or resetting the error state.
errorBoundary.diagnosticsHint: GitHub bug reports and copied diagnostics include the error message, stack traces, app version, active tab, selected team, task context, and environment details.

tokenUsage.accumulatedHint: Accumulated across entire session without duplication

extensionStoreView.title: Extensions
extensionStoreView.desktopOnly: Available in the desktop app only.
extensionStoreView.cliRequiredWarning: Claude CLI is required to install or uninstall extensions. Install it from Settings.
extensionStoreView.activeSessionsWarning: Running sessions won't pick up extension changes until restarted.

tabs.pluginsDescription: Small add-ons for Claude. They give the app extra features and integrations you can install when you need them.
tabs.mcpServersDescription: Connections to outside tools and apps. They let Claude read data or do actions beyond this app.
tabs.skillsDescription: Ready-made instructions for common jobs. They help Claude do specific tasks better and more consistently.
tabs.apiKeysDescription: Secret keys for online services. Add them here so plugins, servers, and integrations can connect and work.

utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.cost_above_typical: Cost per commit is above typical range
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.cache_hit_rate: {pct}% cache hit rate — prompt structure may reduce caching
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.tools_failing: Multiple tool calls are failing — check error section for details
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.tools_elevated_failure: Some tools have elevated failure rates
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.thrashing_unclear_direction: Repeated commands and file rework suggest unclear direction
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.thrashing_some_repeated: Some repeated commands or file rework occurred
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.friction_rate_detail: {pct}% friction rate — try more detailed initial prompts
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.compaction_occurred: {count} compaction(s) occurred — session may lose early context
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.test_failures_increased: Test failures increased over the session
utils.reportAssessments.takeawayDetails.no_significant_issues: No significant issues detected across all metrics

utils.reportAssessments.explanations.thr.none: No repeated commands or reworked files

utils.reportAssessments.explanations.pro.well_specified: Clear first message with low friction rate
utils.reportAssessments.explanations.pro.underspecified: Short initial prompt led to many corrections
utils.reportAssessments.explanations.pro.verbose_but_unclear: Long initial prompt but still high friction

utils.reportAssessments.explanations.tes.improving: Test failures decreased over the session
utils.reportAssessments.explanations.tes.stable: Test results stayed roughly the same
utils.reportAssessments.explanations.tes.regressing: Test failures increased over the session
utils.reportAssessments.explanations.tes.insufficient_data: Not enough test runs to determine trend

utils.reportAssessments.modelMismatch.mechanical_recommendation: Consider using Haiku for mechanical tasks to reduce cost.
utils.reportAssessments.modelMismatch.read_only_recommendation: Consider using Haiku or Sonnet for read-only exploration tasks.

utils.bugReportUtils.app_crashed_error_screen: The app crashed and showed the global error screen.
utils.bugReportUtils.step_1: Open the app and navigate to the screen where the crash happened.
utils.bugReportUtils.step_2: Repeat the action that triggered the error.
utils.bugReportUtils.expected_behavior_detail: The app should continue working instead of crashing.
utils.bugReportUtils.screenshots_detail: Attach a screenshot if you have one.

slashCommands.doctor: Check the health of your Claude Code installation.
slashCommands.help: Show available slash commands and usage tips.
slashCommands.init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file in the current directory.
slashCommands.logout: Log out from your current account.

thrashing.none: No repeated commands or reworked files

promptQuality.wellSpecified: Clear first message with low friction rate
promptQuality.underspecified: Short initial prompt led to many corrections
promptQuality.verboseButUnclear: Long initial prompt but still high friction

testTrajectory.improving: Test failures decreased over the session
testTrajectory.stable: Test results stayed roughly the same
testTrajectory.regressing: Test failures increased over the session
testTrajectory.insufficientData: Not enough test runs to determine trend

takeaways.elevatedCostPerCommitDetail: Cost per commit is above typical range
takeaways.lowCacheEfficiencyDetail: cache hit rate — prompt structure may reduce caching
takeaways.toolReliabilityIssuesDetail: Multiple tool calls are failing — check error section for details
takeaways.degradedToolHealthDetail: Some tools have elevated failure rates
takeaways.significantThrashingDetail: Repeated commands and file rework suggest unclear direction
takeaways.mildThrashingDetail: Some repeated commands or file rework occurred
takeaways.promptQualityIssuesDetail: friction rate — try more detailed initial prompts
takeaways.contextWindowPressureDetail: occurred — session may lose early context
takeaways.testsRegressingDetail: Test failures increased over the session
takeaways.sessionHealthyDetail: No significant issues detected across all metrics

modelMismatch.mechanicalRecommendation: Consider using Haiku for mechanical tasks to reduce cost.
modelMismatch.readOnlyRecommendation: Consider using Haiku or Sonnet for read-only exploration tasks.

promptNotes.underspecified: Short initial prompt with multiple corrections suggests the task needed more upfront specification.
promptNotes.verboseButUnclear: Initial prompt was detailed but still required corrections — consider restructuring for clarity.
promptNotes.wellSpecified: Low friction — initial prompt effectively communicated intent.
promptNotes.moderateFriction: Moderate friction detected — review correction patterns for improvement opportunities.

compactionNotes.compacted: Session underwent compaction, which may have caused loss of earlier context. Check for repeated work after compaction events.
compactionNotes.noCompaction: No compaction occurred — session stayed within context limits.

createTeam.descriptionCopy: Create a new team based on an existing one.
createTeam.descriptionCreate: Team provisioning via local Claude CLI.

conflict.alreadyRunning: Another team "“{{name}}”" is already running for this working directory
conflict.riskWarning: Running two teams in the same directory is risky — they may conflict editing the same files. Consider using a different directory or a git worktree for isolation.

cli.envNotAvailable: CLI environment is not available — launch is blocked
cli.installHint: Make sure claude CLI is installed and available in PATH, then reopen this dialog.
cli.preFlightCheck: Pre-flight check to catch errors before launch

createTeam.electronOnly: Available only in local Electron mode.
createTeam.soloTeamDescription: Only the team lead (main process) will be started — no teammates will be spawned. Works like a regular Claude session but with access to the task board for planning. Saves tokens by avoiding teammate coordination overhead. You can add members later from the team settings.
createTeam.startImmediately: Start the team immediately via local Claude CLI.
createTeam.optionalLaunchDescription: Prompt, model, safety, and CLI overrides live here when you need them.
createTeam.promptPlaceholder: Instructions for the team lead during provisioning...
createTeam.optionalTeamDetailsDescription: Keep the default flow compact and only open this when you want extra context or a custom color.
createTeam.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the team purpose

launchTeam.descriptionLaunch: Start team {{name}} via local Claude CLI.

conflict.alreadyRunning: Another team "“{{name}}”" is already running for this working directory
conflict.riskWarning: Running two teams in the same directory is risky — they may conflict editing the same files. Consider using a different directory or a git worktree for isolation.

cli.notInstalled: Claude CLI is not installed — launch is blocked
cli.installFromDashboard: Install Claude CLI from the Dashboard, then reopen this dialog.
cli.preFlightCheck: Pre-flight check to catch errors before launch
cli.failedToWarmUp: Failed to warm up Claude CLI environment
cli.selectWorkingDir: Select a working directory to validate the launch environment.
cli.preloadNotSupported: Current preload version does not support team:prepareProvisioning. Restart the dev app.

launchTeam.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available. Create a team first.
launchTeam.labelPlaceholder: e.g., Daily code review, Nightly tests...
launchTeam.optionalLaunchDescription: Keep the launch flow focused on the project path and only expand this when you want extra control.
launchTeam.clearContextWarning: The team lead will start a new session without resuming previous context. All accumulated session memory and conversation history will not be available.
launchTeam.promptPlaceholderSchedule: Instructions for Claude to execute on schedule...
launchTeam.promptOneShotDescription: This prompt will be passed to claude -p for one-shot execution
